It has a roof-prism design, a compact and ergonomic design allowing comfortable one-handed operation. It offers 8x magnification, 42mm lenses and a field of view of 6.8°. The binoculars provide a clear and sharp image, which is ensured by the 3-element lenses in two groups and the multiple anti-reflective coating used on the optics. Allows adjustment of the interpupillary distance in the range of 53-74 mm. It can also be used by wearers of dioptric glasses, it allows diopter adjustment ±4D. The Levenhuk New Karma Plus binoculars are suitable for medium and long distance observation.
